nasb.text: Stand by the road and keep watch, O inhabitant of Aroer; Ask him who flees and her who escapes And say, ‘What has happened?’

esv.text: Stand by the way and watch, O inhabitant of Aroer! Ask him who flees and her who escapes; say, ‘What has happened?’

cnv.text: 亞羅珥的居民哪！ 要站在路旁觀望， 詢問那些正在逃跑的男女，說： ‘發生了甚麼事？’

ccb.text: 亚罗珥的居民啊！ 你们要站在路旁观望， 询问逃难的男女究竟发生了什么事。
